calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Marcolini, Esq. (415-568-0742) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is discussed. The Court rules as follows: JUDGMENT DEBTOR ERIC TOBIN'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Denied. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
